\tzpentry{ID4426}{Combo Chemical Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4426 introduces Combo Chemical Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S[g_{\mu\nu},\Psi] = \int_{T^2\times T^2} \!\!\sqrt{-\det g}\, \Bigl( R[g] + \pi\,\mathrm{Tr}\,K_{\mathrm{kiss}} + S_{\mathrm{vN}}[\rho_{\mathrm{red}}(\Psi)] \Bigr)\,\mathrm{d}^4x, \end{equation}
